message.content:
### 1. Rendering Check  
- Renders correctly: No white/blank screen, no broken layout, no error overlay, no console errors.  
- Images load: Anime cover image and episode list thumbnails (green circular icons) are visible.  


### 2. UI Elements  
- **Bottom sheet header**: Title "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation" (top of sheet).  
- **Close button**: "X" icon (top-right corner).  
- **Drag handle**: Implied (standard bottom sheet behavior, no explicit handle shown).  
- **Cover image**: Thumbnail of the anime (left of title).  
- **Anime title**: "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation" (large text).  
- **Metadata**:  
  - Score: "84%" (star icon).  
  - Type: "TV" (TV icon).  
  - Season/year: "WINTER 2021" (calendar icon).  
  - Episodes: "11 eps" (circle icon).  
  - Rating: "R-17" (red badge).  
  - Genres: "ADVENTURE", "DRAMA", "FANTASY" (tags).  
- **Synopsis**: "A 34-year-old Japanese NEET is kicked out of his home following his parents' death... world of swords and magic."  
- **Studio**: "Studio: Studio Bind".  
- **Episode list header**: "EPISODES" (section title).  
- **Episode list**:  
  - "11 total" (right of "EPISODES").  
  - Numbered rows (1–5 visible):  
    - "Episode 1" (24 min, green circular "1" icon, play arrow).  
    - "Episode 2" (24 min, green circular "2" icon, play arrow).  
    - "Episode 3" (24 min, green circular "3" icon, play arrow).  
    - "Episode 4" (24 min, green circular "4" icon, play arrow).  
    - "Episode 5" (green circular "5" icon, play arrow, partially cut off).  


### 3. Design Match Against Intended Goals  
- **Dark premium theme**: Black background, charcoal cards (episode list rows), emerald-green accent (episode icons, play arrows) – matches.  
- **Mobile-first portrait layout**: Vertical layout, compact spacing – matches.  
- **Bottom sheet style**: Rounded top corners (implied by partial overlay), overlays previous screen – matches.  
- **Episode list**: Numbered rows with thumbnails (green icons), scrollable (partial cut-off of Episode 5 suggests scrollability) – matches.  


### 4. Visual Issues  
- **Text truncation**: Episode 5 title is partially cut off (only "Episode 5" visible, no duration).  
- **Spacing**: Minor spacing between episode list rows (consistent, no major issues).  
- **Color mismatches**: None (emerald-green accents, black background, charcoal cards align with theme).  
- **Layout bugs**: None (elements are aligned, no overlaps).  
- **Missing images**: None (cover image and episode thumbnails load).
